arts.ttl: Aston Villa can seal Jack Grealish reunion after Man City stance emerges
arts.sum: Jack Grealish is one of a number of senior Manchester City players who have reportedly been informed to find new clubs once the summer transfer window emerges - which would mean the Aston Villa academy product and record sale being available for a move. Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action.

arts.ttl: Marco Asensio has made his Aston Villa intentions crystal clear
arts.sum: "He has that mentality and the players have it too so I am really looking forward to what is left of this season because I believe there are lots of important challenges ahead for Aston Villa and we can feel that the support of the fans is there to help us achieve it. Aston Villa loanee Marco Asensio, who scored twice in the 2-1 win over Chelsea on Saturday, is eager to add more silverware to his trophy cabinet

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford not being 'pandered to' as Aston Villa boss makes smart dressing room move
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has been praised for slowly easing Marcus Rashford into the team and helping the on-loan Manchester United star to stay motivated at Villa Park An ex-Manchester United star has hailed Unai Emery's approach of "not pandering to" Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Guéhi on dealing with pressure, working with Glasner and Villa Challenge
arts.sum: Crystal Palace skipper Marc Guéhi says the Eagles are determined to continue climbing the table ahead of a quick return to action on Tuesday evening (19:30 GMT) against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Revealed: The secret formula which has predicted Aston Villa's Premier League finish
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa striker and pundit Chris Sutton has revealed that he has a'secret formula' to determine how the race for the Champions League places will finish - and it has predicted that Villa face a struggle to repeat their achievement of last season. Indeed, having studied the fixtures remaining of each club between third and 11th, and working out the likeliest results based on league positions for those clubs - as well as factoring in games to be played in other competitions - Sutton has Villa to stay where they are and accrue 19 more points from their final 11 games.

arts.ttl: Lineker and Shearer Both Notice Same Thing About Marcus Rashford at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has burst into life at Aston Villa and two England legends have praised him for having a smile back on his face

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery's side bidding to extend seven-season streak in Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to extend a Premier League streak to eight seasons when they square off against Crystal Palace on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace ready to rival Nottingham Forest for Middlesbrough midfielder
